title: GEEPAS Electric Hand Mixer | Electric Whisk with Storage Base 5-Speed & Turbo Eject Button Handheld Food Collection Cake Mixer Stainless Steel Beaters & Dough Hooks for Whipping Cream 400W Ultra Power
features: ✅ 400W POWERFUL MOTOR, 5 SPEEDS & TURBO - With its robust 400W motor and five-speed settings, along with turbo function provides an additional power boost. It includes an easy-release eject button for effortless removal of beaters and dough hooks. The thumb-operated speed control allows you to effortlessly mix egg whites, cake batter, and other mixtures to the perfect consistency.

✅ BEATERS AND DOUGH HOOKS - Equipped with 2 beaters for whipping eggs, cream, and mixing cookie or cake batter, and 2 dough hooks for kneading short or thick bread dough, this hand mixer is essential for all your baking needs. The 5-speed mixing and whisking capabilities make it the perfect kitchen companion, enabling you to effortlessly stir dry flour, jam, soft dough, and even mash ingredients.

✅ EJECT FUNCTION, EASY CLEANING, SAFTY FEATURES - Featuring an eject function and safety features, the nozzle reset button enables swift removal and replacement of parts. All detachable components are dishwasher-safe, ensuring easy cleaning, and the lightweight design adds convenience. The interlock system for beaters and dough hooks enhances safety and security, allowing for effortless whisking, mixing, and kneading while prioritizing your well-being.

✅ SPACE SAVING & COMPACT DESIGN: The handheld mixer features an ergonomic shaped handle for optimum comfort. And, it comes with a compact storage base with which you are able to store all your attachments. The hand mixer for baking is very compact and takes quite a small room, which can greatly fit into your cupboard and cabinet.

✅ MULTI-FEATURES, 2-YEAR WARRANTY, PACKAGE INCLUDES - Loaded with multiple features, this package comes with a two-year warranty and package includes Electric Cake Mixer x1, Stainless Steel Egg Beaters x2, Dough Hooks x2, Storage Stand x1, User Manual.
description: Product Description 400W POWERFUL MOTOR Powerful 400W motor for fast, smooth, and effortless mixing—ideal for everyday kitchen tasks. EJECT FUNCTION Eject function & safety nozzle reset button allow quick, secure removal & replacement of parts. BEATERS AND DOUGH HOOKS Equipped with 2 beaters & 2 dough hooks, this hand mixer is perfect for all your baking needs. 5 SPEEDS & TURBO Five-speed settings plus turbo function deliver precise control and extra power for tough mixing tasks. STORAGE STAND Compact storage base keeps all attachments organized and easily accessible in one place. VERSATILE ATTACHMENTS Electric Cake Mixer with 2 Egg Beaters, 2 Dough Hooks & Storage Stand – Compact, Versatile & Durable EASY TO USE Ergonomic handle handheld mixer ensures comfort, control & easy use for effortless mixing tasks. SPACE SAVING Compact hand mixer for baking – space-saving design, ideal for small kitchens and easy storage.
